title: Uruguayan Beef Skewers Italian-Style
description: A twist on traditional Italian skewers featuring smoky and sweet flavors from Uruguay. Marinated beef is grilled to perfection and served with a side of Italian flair.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together chimichurri mix, red wine, olive oil, garlic, and parsley.
2. Add the beef strips to the marinade and mix until coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Thread the marinated beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
6. Transfer the skewers to a plate and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Serve immediately with lemon wedges and Italian bread.
8. Enjoy your delicious Uruguayan beef skewers Italian-style!
